summary: Completed frontend testing of Pricing page (/resources/pricing). All 16 test features passed - page loads correctly, hero section displays, all selection cards (3 pricing options, 5 software programs, 5 business types, 5 payment platforms) are visible and selectable, software-platform compatibility rules work correctly (Cloverâ†’FISERV, Squareâ†’Square, Payanywhereâ†’EPX, Dejavoo/Ingenicoâ†’TSYS/Cygma/EPX), progress dots update, summary badges appear when all selections made, 'Start Your Merchant Application' button shows and opens Lead Connector modal, modal closes correctly, switching software resets incompatible platform selection, and Pricing link appears in Resources dropdown navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - clean React component with proper state management using useState and useMemo
Software-platform compatibility logic correctly implemented using useMemo for availablePlatforms
Auto-select behavior for single-platform software works correctly via useEffect
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Minor: unused imports (CheckCircle, ChevronRight, CreditCard, Monitor, ShoppingCart, Utensils, Building2, Globe, Briefcase) in Pricing.jsx could be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing page fully tested - all 16 features working. Key compatibility rules verified: Cloverâ†’FISERV only, Squareâ†’Square only, Payanywhereâ†’EPX only, Dejavoo/Ingenicoâ†’TSYS/Cygma/EPX. Progress dots, selection summary, Lead Connector modal all working. Navigation link in Resources dropdown working.
